session.user: Run `npx prettier --write docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the results. Just run the command and report output - do not modify any files yourself.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier on two markdown documentation files

session.assistant:
**prettier passed**: Both files were formatted successfully
- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - 66ms - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - 21ms
The files have been reformatted according to Prettier's code style standards.
